description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Stable Compilation that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use a ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test compilation on multiple container images including ubuntu:18.04, debian:10, ubuntu:20.04, and ubuntu:21.04. For each image, cancel previous workflow runs, check out the code, install dependencies, compile the project with CMake and Ninja, install it, and run tests.
